---
title: "Grads"
output:
  quarto::bookdown_html:
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="image-gallery">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC2235.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC2460.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC2586.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC2644.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC3872.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC3967.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC6356.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC6405.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC6442.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC7960-Edit.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/_DSC9097-Edit.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/0AC69765-70BF-440F-8A47-D708E5C1F388-D9ADFA73-EEC4-44D5-96D5-48CF6786239F.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/0D6B6A6D-A191-4E01-AD5E-16ADDD4CDD56-3A9875FD-6CD5-4F8B-89A9-BBA56B045C9D.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_0546_Original.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_0628_Original.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_0796_Original.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_1744.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_2044.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_2101.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_6877-2.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_7131-2.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_7475-2_Original.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_7832-2.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_7886-2.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
  <img src="images/grads/DSC_8226-2-2.jpg" style="max-width: 500px">
